name: aisentinel
display_name: AISentinel — Pre-tool Policy Enforcement for AI Agents
description: Security, control, and observability layer for AI agents. Evaluates every MCP tool call against a YAML policy (allow / block / require_human_approval) and writes an append-only JSONL audit trail.
long_description: AISentinel runs as an MCP server in front of any tool call. It enforces policy before invocation, blocks destructive operations, gates sensitive writes behind human approval, and produces a tamper-evident audit log. Compatible with Claude Desktop, Claude Code, Cursor, Cline, and any MCP client.

tools.name: evaluate_tool_call
tools.description: Evaluates a tool call against the configured YAML policy and returns the decision (allow / block / require_human_approval) with reasoning.

policy_path.title: Policy YAML file (absolute path)
policy_path.description: Absolute path to a YAML policy file. See https://github.com/Kabzhanov/AISentinel/tree/main/policies for built-in policies (default, strict, mcp-test, planet-prod).

log_dir.title: Audit log directory
log_dir.description: Directory for the append-only JSONL audit log. Default: ~/.aisentinel
